subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance and standest before the Throne, hearken unto the Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه و الحاضر امام العرش اسمع الندآء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @thankfulness; gratitude
